Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to provide source material for email content generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active promotions, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling daily marketing email using scraped product data, including subject line, body copy, and call-to-action tailored to brake parts buyers.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content daily with zero copywriting hours, enabling consistent customer engagement at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content and sends it to the designated R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers targeted daily emails to segmented audiences automatically, driving repeat purchases and brand recall without manual send management.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, friction material details, and current promotions to supply content for email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content grounded in real product data and current offers, eliminating manual research and reducing content errors.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Crafts a daily marketing email for DFC customers including subject line, body, and CTA based on the scraped website content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers consistent, high-quality marketing copy every day without copywriter involvement, scaling DFC's outreach capacity significantly.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated DFC marketing email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists on a daily schedule.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send pipeline for DFC email marketing, ensuring no sending day is missed and campaign cadence remains consistent.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer message, ticket category, and associated contact details.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for automated processing, ensuring no ticket goes unreviewed and reducing queue backlog.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies the support ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually accurate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts average ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volumes while maintaining reply quality.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review, edit, and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all drafted responses inside the existing support workflow, enabling agents to act quickly without switching tools or copying content.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all in-box flyer return and issue form submissions from HubSpot, capturing customer-reported problems tied to Amazon orders.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates scattered form submissions into a structured data pipeline, replacing manual export tasks and ensuring no submissions are missed.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review, filtering, and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a real-time, organized view of customer issues, enabling faster root-cause identification and quality improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when DFC customers engage with the R1 Concepts website, such as page visits or form interactions.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces real-time buying signals so the sales team can reach out at the exact moment a customer is showing interest, improving conversion timing.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an immediate alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email, including the customer name, activity details, and a HubSpot contact link.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between a customer showing interest and a sales rep being notified, enabling timely outreach that increases deal velocity.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently under development with connections and functionality not yet finalized.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions for R1 Concepts, reducing support load and improving response times at scale.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and web sources to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space, then discovers their contact emails.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh list of qualified local leads daily without any manual prospecting, dramatically expanding outreach volume for the sublet opportunity.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates or updates contact records in HubSpot for each discovered lead, logging business details and flagging them for the sublet outreach campaign.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Keeps all prospective sublet leads organized and trackable inside HubSpot, enabling follow-up sequences and preventing duplicate outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Sends a personalized warm introduction email to each new lead presenting the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity with relevant space details.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers daily outreach to fresh prospects on autopilot, keeping the sublet opportunity in front of potential tenants and accelerating deal pipeline.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls current campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, ACOS, and keyword performance.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Centralizes cross-brand ad data into a single analysis pipeline, eliminating manual reporting and surfacing performance gaps faster.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes the Amazon ad performance data to identify underperforming campaigns, bid optimization opportunities, and keyword recommendations for both R1 and DFC.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable optimization insights without requiring a dedicated PPC analyst, improving ROAS and reducing wasted ad spend across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / DuckDuckGo API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using input keywords to surface relevant content creators and their public profile data across platforms.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator research by aggregating multi-platform discovery results in one automated pass, massively expanding the candidate pool.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes discovered creator profiles using Google Gemini to assess content relevance, audience fit, and brand alignment based on the search keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large pool of raw discovery results into a prioritized shortlist of relevant creators, saving hours of manual profile review.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist in seconds, enabling marketing teams to focus outreach on only the highest-potential partners.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and outreach sequence templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes creator data and messaging templates so every outreach is consistent and based on pre-approved sequences.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned prompts and sequence logic to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale without manual copywriting, increasing reply rates and saving hours of drafting time.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the connected account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the send process so creators receive timely, personalized outreach without any manual email management.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to provide context for learned response patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving deal consistency and reducing back-and-forth cycles.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a context-aware negotiation or follow-up response based on learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles creator negotiations intelligently at scale, maintaining deal momentum and reducing time-to-agreement.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-generated negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps conversations moving without requiring manual intervention on every reply, freeing the team to focus on deal closure.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and matches part numbers against the New Availability Guide to produce a validated load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle fitment data, reducing load sheet prep from hours to seconds with near-zero errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates a HubSpot email draft attaching the generated sales sheet and load sheet for the weekly MHM send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates email assembly so the team can review and deploy the weekly campaign without building it from scratch each Monday.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the designated Teams channel confirming the email draft and load sheet are ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Instantly alerts the team when the automation finishes so no send is delayed waiting on a status update.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling First to Market email copy and monthly recap content based on new product launch details and sales sheet data.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email drafts in seconds, ensuring new products hit dealer inboxes faster and with consistent brand messaging.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates the email draft in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, attaches the product sales sheet, and stages it for review and send.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Cuts email build time from hours to minutes and keeps all launch communications organized within the existing CRM workflow.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Pulls accurate CRM performance data instantly, replacing manual report exports that previously took significant prep time.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, conversion, and user behavior metrics to populate the digital performance slides.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers session, conversion, and engagement data automatically so no analyst needs to manually pull GA4 reports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance data including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue driven.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS results alongside other channels automatically, giving leadership a complete picture without manual data gathering.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, populating charts, tables, and text placeholders.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated monthly deck in minutes instead of hours, ready for leadership review without any manual slide editing.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impressions, clicks, and ranking positions.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints the highest-opportunity keywords to target, ensuring every blog produced directly addresses real traffic gaps rather than guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting identified keyword gaps, structured with proper headings, meta descriptions, and on-page elements.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO articles at scale, compressing weeks of content production into an automated pipeline.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to the WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and readability settings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Gets optimized content live without manual CMS entry, accelerating indexing and organic rank improvements.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, due dates, outstanding quantities, and vendor contact details.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual ERP report pulls, ensuring the follow-up workflow always starts with fresh, accurate PO data.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates vendor follow-up at scale, ensuring no overdue PO is missed and reducing manual outreach coordination for the purchasing team.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number input, matches each part against the uploaded New Availability Guide, and computes the formatted load sheet rows.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member instant load sheet generation directly in their browser with no server dependency or technical setup required.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched and formatted data as a downloadable Excel file structured to DFC load sheet specifications.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it to create a new campaign draft.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's vehicle name and scheduled send time, then saves it as ready for launch.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Delivers a correctly configured weekly SMS campaign without any manual editing, ensuring timely sends and accurate vehicle messaging every Monday.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a clean, complete sales dataset that powers all downstream segmentation and campaign targeting without manual data pulls.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts based on purchase behavior and enrolls each segment into targeted sequences including reorder reminders, cross-sell campaigns, and win-back flows.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Automates the full customer lifecycle outreach, turning raw sales data into active revenue-generating campaigns without manual segmentation or email builds.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Triggers targeted SMS messages to high-priority customer segments identified from the sales analysis, including win-back and reorder nudges.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches customers on a high-engagement channel with timely, relevant offers, increasing reorder rates and recovering lapsed accounts faster.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, saving team coordination time.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a shareable download link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Produces a clean, trackable download URL ready to be embedded in the email, ensuring recipients always get the latest file version.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently formatted weekly email to the full list without any manual design or scheduling work, maintaining brand consistency at scale.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured, SEO-optimized B2B blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleets.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready content at scale without copywriter hours, consistently targeting high-intent keywords that drive qualified organic traffic.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes it as a formatted post with proper SEO metadata and categorization.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps the DFC blog consistently populated with fresh, indexed content that compounds organic search visibility over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia — all using Puppeteer.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting, giving the workflow rich, accurate source material before a single word is written or recorded.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives all scraped vehicle data and generates a fully structured Friction Friday video script, including intro hooks, segment breakdowns, and a thumbnail concept brief.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds instead of hours, maintaining consistent show format and tone across every episode without writer involvement.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using the configured AI voice model.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a studio-quality narration track instantly, removing the need to schedule, record, and edit a human voiceover session.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives all finished assets — script, voiceover file, thumbnail image, and assembled video metadata — and logs them to a structured sheet while triggering final assembly and delivery steps via webhook.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Creates a single organized record of every produced episode with all linked assets, making the content library searchable and the production pipeline fully auditable.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, delays, and branch logic for site visit and welcome series flows.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies gaps and redundancies in the automation stack so that every new lead and site visitor enters the right sequence without falling through the cracks.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies optimized trigger conditions, updated email sequences, and corrected delays to the live workflows.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Improves lead nurture efficiency and welcome series open rates by ensuring contacts receive timely, relevant follow-up based on actual site behavior.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Exports DFC customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and purchase history from the ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Surfaces the authoritative customer dataset needed to create a reliable bridge between transactional ERP data and marketing CRM records.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record and writes the ID as a custom property.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Enables DFC sales automation workflows to fire based on real purchase data, unlocking personalized sequences tied to actual customer behavior.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow to be determined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Scoping this project early ensures the right tools and data flows are identified before build begins, reducing rework.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects the latest R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts the title, description, transcript, and video URL.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Publishes a formatted blog post using the video transcript and metadata with embedded video and SEO-optimized copy.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Turns every YouTube upload into a searchable long-form asset that builds R1's organic search presence over time.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Increases weekly video views through a direct mobile channel with significantly higher open rates than email alone.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, click-through rates, and index coverage for all DFC blog URLs.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides ground-truth search performance data that shows exactly which posts are gaining ranking momentum and which need optimization.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session counts, organic traffic volume, engagement rates, and conversion events for DFC blog content.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post-level metadata including publish dates, word counts, categories, and Yoast SEO scores for all blog entries.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Adds content efficiency metrics to the report so stakeholders can see output volume and content quality alongside traffic results.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword rankings, impressions, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog URLs.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic, user behavior, and goal completion data attributed to R1 blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ties SEO performance to real user actions and business outcomes, justifying ongoing investment in the blog automation program.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Exports post-level data including publish frequency, content categories, and post status for the monthly reporting period.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides operational transparency into content output so the report captures both performance and production efficiency in one view.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice emails and extracts the attached PDF files.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email monitoring and PDF downloading, capturing every invoice automatically as it arrives.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Processes each extracted PDF using PDF tools to stamp the Harbor Tires company stamp and overlay Richard's signature at the correct position.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Transforms a multi-minute manual stamping and signing task into a sub-second automated process, handling high invoice volumes without errors.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the completed stamped-and-signed PDF back to the appropriate recipient or internal folder via Outlook.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Closes the loop on the approval workflow automatically, ensuring vendors and internal teams receive processed invoices without any human hand-off.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and passes behavioral data to HubSpot to trigger the correct workflow phase.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Ensures outreach is based on actual buyer intent signals, making follow-up emails timely and contextually relevant to what the prospect was researching.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Fires one of 6 mapped Phase 1 workflow triggers based on the specific prospect page visited, enrolling the contact into the appropriate automated email sequence.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers hyper-relevant follow-up to prospects at the right moment, reducing manual outreach effort and increasing conversion likelihood through personalized timing.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support tickets from available channels and queues them for AI classification and response.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all incoming requests so no ticket is missed and response time begins immediately without manual triage.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, determines urgency, drafts a resolution or response, and flags tickets that require human escalation.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Eliminates manual first-response work for common issues, cutting average handle time and freeing support staff for complex cases.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Logs the AI-generated response or escalation note back into the ticket, updates its status, and routes it to the appropriate queue or sends the reply to the customer.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Closes the loop on routine tickets automatically and ensures agents receive pre-analyzed context on escalated ones, reducing resolution time across the board.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young delivers the monthly new arrivals file via Teams, triggering the agent to begin the distribution workflow.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Standardizes the content handoff process so the agent can begin immediately without waiting for manual uploads or email chains.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Uploads the new arrivals file to the DFC backend, making the product data live and linkable for outgoing marketing messages.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Ensures all email and SMS links point to live, accurate product pages, preventing dead links and improving customer purchase experience.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals content, and schedules it for monthly distribution to the DFC email list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Removes hours of manual email building each month, ensuring consistent branded formatting and on-time delivery.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the NAG SMS template, inserts new arrival highlights and links, and schedules the text message send to the DFC subscriber list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Extends new arrival reach to mobile subscribers simultaneously with email, maximizing early traffic to newly listed products.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence, automatically sending RFQ emails with required shipping parameters.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data across all three paid channels, including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Turns raw numbers into actionable context instantly, allowing the team to spot performance shifts and act before issues compound.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the relevant team members on a recurring schedule.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Pulls full-month performance data from all paid channels, including spend, reach, conversions, ROAS, and CPL metrics.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures and formats the monthly data into slide-ready sections, writes executive summaries, and highlights key wins, misses, and recommendations.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to the team or stakeholders, formatted and ready to be dropped into end-of-month slides.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Ensures the report lands in stakeholders' inboxes before the monthly review meeting with zero manual assembly required.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them as a qualified customer in the CRM.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Creates a clean, intent-verified customer segment automatically, ensuring only genuine buyers are passed downstream for audience targeting.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit report with flagged ads and copy recommendations to the paid social team for review and implementation.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Puts a ready-to-act improvement plan directly in the team's inbox, cutting the time between identifying a problem and fixing it.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, approaching deadlines, or stalled items across active projects.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps stakeholders informed of project status automatically, reducing the need for manual check-ins and status meetings.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes task activity, identifies blockers or at-risk items, and drafts a concise status update or action-required message.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data for all active search ads, including headlines, descriptions, CTR, conversion rate, and Quality Score for each ad variant.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec (make, model, year, and related attributes) via a HubSpot form, which triggers a lookup against DFC's full parts catalog for matching and missing inventory.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats and structures the catalog match data and missing inventory gaps into a clean, organized Excel-ready output with clear categorization and labeling.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, professional catalog document automatically, saving hours of manual formatting and ensuring consistent structure across every request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark as an attachment, with a brief summary of what was found and what gaps exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, replacing what was previously a manual multi-hour lookup and formatting process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, in-transit status, and sourcing availability.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups by centralizing all inventory enrichment into one automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Receives the enriched inventory data and updates each backorder line item with its current status, flagging any parts with no source or fulfillment path as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static weekly report into a live, actionable document where every line tells the full story — no cross-referencing required.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-written with the relevant status, expected timing, and any escalation flags.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables customer-facing teams to send accurate, professional order updates in minutes rather than manually researching and writing each message from scratch.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all two-piece rotor listings with their make, model, year, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Consolidates three separate competitor catalogs into one unified dataset automatically, replacing what would otherwise be days of manual catalog research.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage gaps and current overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals which vehicle fitments competitors cover that DFC does not, creating a prioritized opportunity map for product expansion.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers or contacts asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market in parallel, giving Dino data-backed justification for which new SKUs to prioritize without manual outreach effort.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and collected demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, actionable output that combines market coverage, internal gaps, and real customer demand — ready to drive sourcing and product decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, including headlines, body text, and CTA fields for every running creative.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of live ad copy in one pull, enabling a comprehensive phrase scan without manually opening individual ads in each platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for the specified target phrases and generates a structured flagged report identifying each match, the ad it appears in, and the exact field where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, replacing a time-consuming manual review that would take hours.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the specific phrase match, the field it appeared in, and the full copy context for each finding.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, actionable compliance or quality review report directly to the requester, ready for immediate follow-up with no additional digging required.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and routes each submission into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or left sitting in an unmonitored inbox, capturing every candidate the moment they apply.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized folder in Drive, named and filed by applicant name, role applied for, and submission date.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, searchable archive of all applicant files that the hiring team can access at any time without digging through email attachments.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the qualifications and requirements of the relevant open role, produces a structured evaluation, and determines whether the candidate should be advanced, denied, or held in a Pending tab for paused roles.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial resume screening from hours to seconds per candidate, giving recruiters a prioritized shortlist with reasoning rather than a raw pile of unreviewed applications.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and file link to a structured dashboard, with denied and advanced candidates in the main tab and paused-role candidates in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of every applicant across all roles, eliminating manual tracking and ensuring paused candidates are never lost or forgotten.

summary: The automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the team — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the overall structure remains consistent with last week's snapshot. The completed agents continue running reliably across daily, weekly, and on-demand schedules, keeping our email, SMS, paid media, SEO, and support workflows humming in the background. With 18 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of exciting work on the horizon as we continue expanding what automation can do for the team!
